sentence: 他年轻时曾是一名优秀的国脚。
pinyin: Tā niánqīng shí céng shì yī míng yōuxiù de guó jiǎo.
english: He was an excellent national football team player when he was young.

sentence: 离开多年后，他依然思念故国的山水。
pinyin: Líkāi duō nián hòu, tā yīrán sīniàn gù guó de shānshuǐ.
english: Even after many years abroad, he still missed the landscapes of his homeland.

sentence: 公司今年招了五名实习生来帮忙。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián zhāo le wǔ míng shí xí shēng lái bāngmáng.
english: The company hired five interns this year to help out.

sentence: 他的绩效考核结果很好，今年奖金不少。
pinyin: Tā de jì xiào kǎohé jiéguǒ hěn hǎo, jīnnián jiǎngjīn bùshǎo.
english: His performance review results were excellent, so his bonus this year is quite good.

sentence: 这款软件是商用版本，需要付费授权。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn ruǎnjiàn shì shāng yòng bǎnběn, xūyào fùfèi shòuquán.
english: This software is the commercial version and requires a paid license.
